summary: Iteration 40 - Complete Monetization System Testing for Titelli Social Commerce Platform. 34/34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: splash screen optimized (~3 seconds), main pages working, client dashboard functional.

minor.issue: VIP plan not available in SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS - returns 'Plan invalide'. VIP is defined in PREMIUM_PLANS but client_premium router not included in server.py
WebSocket connection closes before established (non-blocking, reconnection attempts visible)

integration_issues.issue: RDV page (/rdv) redirects to auth even when logged in - may need session persistence check

action_items: Consider including client_premium router in server.py if VIP plan (19.99 CHF) is needed for clients
Investigate RDV page redirect issue - may need to check route protection logic
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Splash screen optimized: SPLASH_DURATION = 3000ms (3 seconds) - verified working
✅ All 3 authentication types working: client, enterprise (entreprise), admin
✅ Stripe webhooks endpoint: /api/webhooks/stripe - supports checkout.session.completed, payment_intent.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted, charge.refunded
✅ RDV Titelli: 8 categories, romantic subscription (200 CHF/month) via Stripe checkout
✅ Lifestyle Passes: Healthy (99 CHF), Better You (149 CHF), MVP (299 CHF) - all checkout URLs redirect to checkout.stripe.com
✅ Titelli Pro++: Enterprise-only (403 for clients), 199 CHF/month subscription via Stripe checkout
✅ Sports: 11 categories (football, tennis, basketball, volleyball, badminton, padel, running, swimming, cycling, fitness, other), matches, teams, competitions
✅ Gamification: Profile with total_points, level, badges, login_streak; 8 levels available
✅ Referral system: Unique code (TIT prefix), stats with referrals_count and total_points_earned, leaderboard
✅ Admin routes: /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/users, /api/admin/accounting/summary - all working with proper 403 for non-admins
✅ Email service: Resend configured with payment confirmation and payment failed templates

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All main pages verified, minor RDV redirect issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All monetization systems verified in production mode. Stripe LIVE keys confirmed. Splash screen optimized to 3 seconds. All payment checkout URLs redirect to checkout.stripe.com. Database contains: 61 users, 6482 enterprises. Email service Resend configured with onboarding@resend.dev.

admin_routes.users: ✅ /api/admin/users - returns users list with total count

referral_system.my_code: ✅ Returns unique code with TIT prefix

frontend_pages_verified.homepage: ✅ Splash screen (3 seconds), header with navigation
frontend_pages_verified.client_dashboard: ✅ /dashboard/client - Stats cards, sidebar menu, Premium upgrade, Parrainage
frontend_pages_verified.sports_page: ✅ /sports - 8 sports filters, 4 tabs (Matchs, Équipes, Compétitions, Mes Matchs)
